title: WORKFORCE EMPOWERMENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: LATINO COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION PRINEVILLE WORKFORCE EMPOWERMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides English tutoring, ESL, and computer classes. Also offers help with resumes, job applications, small business workshops, and related advice. 185 NW 4th Street Suite 1 Prineville, OR 97754 Eligibility: Unrestricted, but focus is on individuals who identify as Latino or Hispanic Hours: Monday-Wednesday 10am-5pm or by appointment, Thursday 10am-7pm Email (541) 788-4829 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 788-4829 Brent Walters [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to register FEES: Class registration fee: $30 Optional book fee: $15 DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties Services: Certificates/Forms Assistance * Immigration Issues English as a Second Language * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY EMPOWERMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LATINO COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION PRINEVILLE
